name: Hermes Agent
short_desc: Nous Research Hermes — personal AI agent with a web dashboard (chat, skills, MCP).
author: Nous Research
description: Hermes is Nous Research's AI agent. This app runs its web dashboard — chat, skills, sessions, MCP servers and usage insights. Set an admin username/password at install; the dashboard is protected by basic auth (Hermes refuses a public bind without it). After install, open the dashboard and configure your model provider / API keys.
